title: psilathera ovata
side_effects: Psilathera ovata can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea in individuals who consume it in large quantities or without proper guidance. In some cases, it may also cause dizziness, headaches, and fatigue, which can be severe enough to interfere with daily activities. Furthermore, improper use of Psilathera ovata may lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and swelling, in individuals who are sensitive to its compounds. Additionally, excessive consumption of this plant may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions and increasing the risk of adverse reactions.
